sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Abh. Berl. Akad.</title_> 1895. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cat. = in Aristotelis Categorias commentarium,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i p. 55), Berlin 1887. <title_ TEIform="title">in Harm. = in Ptolemaei Harmonica,</title_> ed. J. Wallis (post Ptole- maeum). <title_ TEIform="title">in Ptol. = in Ptolemaei Tetrabiblon,</title_> Basel 1559 (cited by page). <title_ TEIform="title">Intr. = Isagoge sive quinque voces,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i p. 1), Berlin 1887. <title_ TEIform="title">Marc. = ad Marcellam,</title_> ed. A. Nauck2, <title_ TEIform="title">Porphyrii Opuscula,</title_> Leipzig (T.) 1886. <title_ TEIform="title">Plot. = Vita Plotini,</title_> ed. A. Westermann, v. Diogenes Laertius; ed. R. Volkmann, v. Plotinus. <title_ TEIform="title">Sent. = Sententiae ad intelligibilia ducentes,</title_> ed. B. Mommert, Leipzig (T.) 1907. <title_ TEIform="title">VP = Vita Pythagorae,</title_> ed. A. Nauck2, <title_ TEIform="title">Porphyrii Opuscula,</title_> Leipzig (T.) 1886.</item>
